title: pteris excelsa var. simplicior
intro: Pteris excelsa var. simplicior, also known as the Fern Leaf or Bracken, is a plant species belonging to the family Pteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pteris excelsa var. simplicior include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood sugar levels, and improving cardiovascular health. Traditionally, it has been prepared as a tea or decoction, and also used in herbal supplements in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
